login.title: Let's Get Started
login.subtitle: Two-Wheeler Service Billing
login.phoneHint: Use the mobile number linked to your shop.
login.phoneSupport: We will send a one-time code to this number.

setup.title: Set Up Your Shop
setup.subtitle: This takes less than 2 minutes
setup.linkHint: These details will be linked to this mobile number.
setup.cityHint: Used for shop code and analytics
setup.pincodeHint: Used for shop code and analytics
setup.mapsPlaceholder: Paste share link from Google Maps
setup.mapsHint: Open Google Maps, tap your shop, share it, then paste the link here.
setup.shopPhotoHint: PNG or JPG — appears on bill PDFs
setup.paymentQrHint: PNG or JPG — appears on every bill PDF
setup.upiRequired: UPI ID is required for bill payments
setup.qrImageError: QR code must be a PNG or JPG image
setup.photoImageError: Shop photo must be a PNG or JPG image

pending.title: Shop Not Registered
pending.subtitle: Your account is signed in, but your shop setup is still pending.
pending.body: Your mobile number is not linked to an active NatBolt Billu yet. Follow below steps to creating bills immediately.
pending.stepOneBody: Send your signed-in mobile number to the NatBolt admin.
pending.stepTwoBody: The admin creates your shop profile and links it to this phone number.
pending.stepThreeBody: After registration, reopen NatBolt Billu and your dashboard will unlock automatically.
pending.tip: Keep this same mobile number for login after registration so your shop opens directly.
pending.whatsappMessage: Hi, please register my shop on NatBolt Billu. My number is {{phone}}.

dashboard.unlimitedActive: Unlimited billing is active for this shop.
dashboard.noBills: No activity yet — tap 'New Bill' or 'Start Job' to create your first job.
dashboard.freePlanBanner: {{used}} of 30 free bills used this month
dashboard.limitReached: You've used all 30 free bills this month. Upgrade to keep billing without limits.
dashboard.upgradeFeatureBody: Get unlimited bills, income reports, and CSV export. No monthly limits.
dashboard.upgradeSummary: Unlock customers, income reports, CSV export, and unlimited monthly billing.

estimate.paidFeatureTitle: Job Cards are a paid feature
estimate.paidFeatureBody: Upgrade to start jobs, track intake, and unlock unlimited billing.
estimate.vehicleDetailsHint: Optional — skip if you don't have the details handy
estimate.jobPhotoHint: Take a photo of the vehicle before starting work
estimate.notesHint: Optional — add complaint details or job instructions.
estimate.notesPlaceholder: Add notes for this job card
estimate.approxTotalHint: Optional — use this only if you want to share an approximate amount before work starts.
estimate.selectVehicleError: Please select or add a vehicle
estimate.addItemError: Add at least one part or service
estimate.whatsappIntro: Your job has been started with {{shopName}}.
estimate.whatsappPurpose: This is a job intake record. Final parts and charges split will be added once the work is completed.
estimate.whatsappClosing: We will update you again with the final bill after the work is done.
estimate.draftSavedBody: Your progress is being kept automatically. You can come back later and continue from the same step.
estimate.draftRestoredBody: Your previous progress has been loaded. Continue from where you left off.

bill.title: Bill
bill.voidConfirm: Void this bill? This cannot be undone.
bill.voidSuccess: The bill has been marked as void.
bill.voidFailed: The bill could not be voided. Please try again.
bill.phoneMissingBody: Add the customer's mobile number before sharing on WhatsApp.
bill.whatsappIntro: Your final bill from {{shopName}} is ready.

customer.title: Customers
customer.paidFeatureTitle: Customer management is a paid feature
customer.paidFeatureBody: Upgrade to access your full customer directory, manage customer details, and unlock unlimited billing.
customer.paidFeatureNote: You can still search and add customers while creating bills.
customer.duplicatePhone: A customer with this number already exists
customer.name: Customer Name

settings.title: Settings
settings.shopPhotoDesc: Upload your shop photo. It will appear on bill PDFs.
settings.uploadPhotoHint: PNG or JPG — appears on bill PDFs
settings.paymentQrDesc: Your own verified QR image appears on every bill PDF. Customers scan it to pay.
settings.uploadQrHint: PNG or JPG — appears on every bill PDF
settings.logoutBody: You'll need to enter your phone number and OTP to sign back in.
settings.errorConnection: Couldn't save — check your connection and try again.
settings.errorSession: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
settings.removeQrBody: Your bill PDFs will show only the UPI ID text. You can re-upload anytime.
settings.removePhotoBody: Your bill PDFs won't show a shop photo. You can re-upload anytime.

customerProfile.title: Service History
customerProfile.paidFeatureTitle: Customer profiles are a paid feature
customerProfile.paidFeatureBody: Upgrade to view detailed customer profiles, manage vehicle history, and unlock unlimited billing.
customerProfile.noHistory: No transactions yet for this customer.
customerProfile.noVehiclesHint: Add one to link it to future bills

catalogue.title: Parts Catalogue
catalogue.subtitle: Manage parts & prices for your shop
catalogue.noParts: Your catalogue is empty. Add parts to speed up estimate creation.
catalogue.resetDefaultsHint: Remove all price overrides and keep only the default catalogue prices.
catalogue.refreshSubtitle: Reload catalogue items and any latest price changes.
catalogue.manageSubtitle: Use these actions when you need to refresh or clean up overrides.
catalogue.resetPartHint: Remove this override and return to the default catalogue price.
catalogue.deleteCustomPartHint: This removes the custom part from your shop catalogue.

income.title: Income Dashboard
income.upgradePrompt: Get unlimited bills, income reports, and CSV export. No monthly limits.

admin.title: NatBolt Admin
admin.conversionRate: Conversion rate — {{paid}} of {{total}} shops on Paid plan
admin.phoneLocked: Phone cannot be changed after registration
admin.mapsInvalid: Google Maps link must be a valid https:// URL
admin.newQrSelected: New QR selected — will upload on save
admin.newPhotoSelected: New photo selected — will upload on save
admin.noBillData: No bill data in this period
admin.conversionInsightBody: Top parts like {{partName}} are used across {{shopCount}} shops. Shops on the Paid plan can see these trends themselves — use this to pitch upgrades.
admin.shopReadyBody: {{shopName}} is ready in the admin list.
admin.billCountResetBody: {{shopName}} can start a fresh Free-plan billing cycle.
admin.shopDeactivatedBody: {{shopName}} is now hidden from the active list and can be restored later.
admin.shopReactivatedBody: {{shopName}} is back in the active list.
admin.confirmDeactivateBody: This hides the shop from the active list, blocks shop-owner login, and keeps all data for audit and recovery.
admin.confirmReactivateBody: This returns the shop to the active list and allows the shop owner to log in again.
admin.confirmResetBody: This clears the Free-plan bill counter for the current month so the shop can keep billing.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
